title: auth-error status check duplicated in three client methods
description: client.rs: The block 'if status == 401 || status == 403 { return Err(ClientError::AuthFailed(status.as_u16())); }' appears verbatim in fetch_session, call, and subscribe_events. Readers must verify independently that all three sites are in sync. Suggested rewrite: add a one-line helper fn check_auth_error(status: reqwest::StatusCode) -> Result<(), ClientError> { if status == 401 || status == 403 { Err(ClientError::AuthFailed(status.as_u16())) } else { Ok(()) } } and replace each block with check_auth_error(status)?;.
